## Layer checklist

- [ ] This layer has a single application or one clear purpose.
- [ ] All values that may change over time are exposed as parameters.
- [ ] The README documents how this layer was tested, including who tested it and in which scenarios (for example teachers, students, summative exams, and/or scale).
- [ ] Critical image build steps fail the layer build when they fail.
- [ ] Code comments are included where they are needed for maintainability.
- [ ] Author information is present

> [!TIP]
> If you are unsure whether your layer meets all of these guidelines, you can still open a pull request. We will help you improve it during review.
